expectedBehavior: Demonstrates the elicitation protocol with four scenarios. Demo 1: agent sends a simple single-select form (favorite color), client auto-picks and accepts, agent confirms the choice. Demo 2: agent sends a full project setup form with 5 field types (text input for name, single-select for template, multi-select for features, integer for Java version, boolean for git init), client auto-fills all fields and accepts, agent prints all configured values. Demo 3: agent sends a form but client DECLINES — agent should report the user declined. Demo 4: agent sends a form but client CANCELS — agent should report the user cancelled. All four demos should complete without errors. The key protocol concept: elicitation is agent-to-client (the agent asks the client, not the other way around).
